evidence: "I'm partial to the history of civil war period, so that certainly colors my viewpoint."
"Some character will be presented with a problem, & while the answer to the dilemma is fairly obvious, the story always seems to take the hard way around."
"The way the plot bounces around, I'm pretty sure those folks wake up in the morning & start implementing their dreams into the story."
"Delivery was another story. Sometimes we get to watch the blue 'loading, please wait' line for half the length of the show."
"While the story was a good one, I was kind of hoping to have the plot follow the priest further than it did."
"This isn't my equipment or download speed; the problem seems to be only with this program."
"The expressions on the characters faces are to be watched."
"Good show, & the characters even influence personal style."
"You'll either love it or hate it; I'm in the former camp."
"We liked it, and we weren't too pleased when it was cancelled."

summary: The user enjoys historical and action dramas, often appreciating character expressions and emotional engagement. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for entertaining content over high production quality.
